command:
echo '=== POLLER STATUS ==='
systemctl status claude-poller.service --no-pager -l 2>&1 | head -20
echo '=== POLLER LAST ID ==='
cat ~/.poller_last_id 2>/dev/null || echo 'not found'
echo '=== N8N WORKFLOWS LIST ==='
curl -s http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows   -H 'X-N8N-API-KEY: n8n_api_cGsw5UdCHVtqCFSiZBJiN1fhGzVvdwuH09Vkrd3V_lW-YKUGi4C1fv7Bx5OtbAL7GgNEO1YmO' 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
data=json.load(sys.stdin)
workflows = data.get('data',[])
print(f'Total workflows: {len(workflows)}')
for w in workflows:
    print(f'  [{w["id"]}] {w["name"]} - active={w["active"]}')
" 2>&1
echo 'DONE_1850'
